About: It is a German word whose meaning is analogous to the English word realm.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the terms Kaiserreich and Königreich.
It is associated with the Weimar Republic.
It is associated with Nazi Germany.
It is associated with the Enabling Act.
It is associated with the Holy Roman Empire.
It is associated with the German Empire.
It is associated with the Roman Empire.
It is associated with the Persian Empire.
It is associated with the Tsardom of Russia.
It is associated with the Russian Empire.
HasA: It has a claim to suzerainty.
It has a German state that would include all German speakers in central Europe.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the meaning analogous to the English word realm.
It is characterized by its use to refer to Nazi Germany.
It is characterized by its use for historical empires.
It is characterized by its use in German history.
It is characterized by its derivation from a Germanic word.
It is characterized by its cognates in Old English, Old Norse, and Gothic.
It is characterized by its ultimate origin from Proto-Indo-European *reg-.
It is characterized by its use in the common German variant of the Holy Roman Empire.
It is characterized by its use as a title for the Emperor.
It is characterized by its adoption by the Nazis to legitimize their government.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the Roman Empire.
It was influenced by the concept of a German state that would include all German speakers in central Europe.
It was influenced by the French Revolution.
It was influenced by the Napoleonic Wars.
It was influenced by the Franco-Prussian War.
